data.title: Podcast stresses importance of early detection in drug overdose cases in emergency care, focusing on substance use trends and challenges.
data.description: In the latest episode of QuidelOrtho Science Bytes, the focus is on substance use trends, the effectiveness of Narcan, and the growing challenges that emergency departments are facing. This episode, which is the 49th in the series, delves into the crucial importance of time in emergency care situations. The discussion revolves around the significance of early drug detection in enhancing patient outcomes. Released on July 24, 2025, the episode examines the pressing issues that healthcare professionals encounter, highlighting the need for prompt and accurate intervention.

data.title: Holafly sells over 10 million eSIMs, offers global enterprise solutions for travelers. Fast-growing in travel-tech sector.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in Dublin, a rapidly growing travel-tech company, Holafly, has successfully addressed a significant concern for international travelers by offering accessible and dependable mobile data services. This accomplishment has led the company to achieve a significant milestone.
Finastra reaches 100% ISO 20022 migration, enabling Fedwire transactions, boosting efficiency.

data.title: EcoFlow introduces TRAIL Series power stations - 200, 300, Plus 300 models designed for outdoor use.
data.description: EcoFlow, a top eco-friendly power solutions provider, has unveiled the TRAIL Series - a lineup consisting of three ultra-compact DC-only portable power stations. This series includes the 200, 300, and Plus 300 models. The launch took place in Seattle on July 24, 2025. This new product range marks a significant development in outdoor power solutions provided by EcoFlow.

data.title: Live event 'America Reads the Bible' aims to unite participants from all 50 states in daily reading. Livestreamed from Museum of the Bible on Great American Pure Flix.
data.description: A nationwide Bible-reading initiative is set to take place at the Museum of the Bible, with participants representing all 50 states. The event, designed to encourage Americans to engage with the Scriptures regularly, will be livestreamed on Great American Pure Flix. Scheduled for July 24, 2025, this initiative is led by Christians Engaged in partnership with Great American.

data.title: TileDB acknowledged in 2025 Gartner Hype Cycle reports for Healthcare and Life Sciences, as a key enabler, announced on July 24, 2025 in Cambridge, Mass.
data.description: A company specializing in database technology has been identified as a significant facilitator for 'Trusted Research Environments' and 'Single-Cell Multiomics Systems'. Based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, TileDB has recently been acknowledged as a Sample Vendor in two Gartner Hype Cycle reports. The recognition came on July 24, 2025, positioning TileDB as a pioneer in multimodal database solutions.

data.title: Rocket Mortgage awarded #1 in mortgage servicing satisfaction by J.D. Power for 11th time, DETROIT, July 24, 2025.
data.description: Rocket Mortgage, a leading retail mortgage lender and a division of Rocket Companies (NYSE: RKT), has secured the top ranking in customer satisfaction, ease of use, customer care, and digital experience. The AI-powered servicing provided by Rocket Mortgage played a key role in achieving this recognition. The company's performance was highlighted in a recent report, earning praise for its exceptional customer service and technology-driven approach. This success positions Rocket Mortgage as the preferred choice for clients seeking a seamless and efficient mortgage lending experience.

data.title: HeroDevs receives $125 million investment from PSG, one of Utah's largest this year. $20 million for HeroDevs Open project.
data.description: HeroDevs, a company in Utah, is making a significant investment in securing legacy software applications. This investment, one of the largest in the state this year, amounts to $20 million. The purpose is to guarantee compliance and protection of enterprise technology infrastructure. The investment reflects HeroDevs' dedication to ensuring the safety and effectiveness of their services for their clients.

data.title: Ayala Group in PH remains on FTSE4Good Index Series, showcasing strong ESG practices.
data.description: In Manila, Philippines on July 24, 2025, the Ayala Group, a leading business group in the country, has been included in the renowned FTSE4Good Index Series. This recognition highlights the group's strong Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) practices. The Ayala Group's presence on this index emphasizes its commitment to sustainable business practices, further enhancing its reputation.

data.title: Motto Mortgage Collective in Everett, Washington hires Cami Anthony as mortgage loan originator, offering competitive rates and local market expertise.
data.description: A franchise specializing in mortgage brokerage in Everett, Washington, known as Motto Mortgage Collective, is offering competitive rates and connecting homebuyers and refinancers with local experts familiar with the market in Washington State. The announcement was made on July 24, 2025. Cami Anthony has recently joined the team, further enhancing the services provided by the franchise.

data.title: Middlefield U.S. Equity Dividend ETF (TSX: MUSA) announces Q3 2025 distributions for unitholders.
data.description: In Toronto on July 24, 2025, the Middlefield U.S. Equity Dividend ETF (TSX: MUSA) disclosed that distributions for Q3 2025 will be disbursed to unitholders. The Fund will be paying dividends to eligible holders of Middlefield U.S. Equity Dividend ETF for the quarter.

data.title: ORCA Marine introduces Finsulate® and Hy.G Motors to U.S market, revolutionizing eco-friendly boating; set for launch in July 24, 2025.
data.description: YARMOUTH, Maine - On July 24, 2025, ORCA Marine USA revealed a groundbreaking development in the boating industry with the introduction of Finsulate® and Hy.G Motors in the United States and Canada. Finsulate®, renowned as a revolutionary product, is set to transform the eco-friendly boating experience. This launch marks a significant turning point in the industry, showcasing two pioneering products that are poised to reshape boating practices. The introduction of these innovative solutions demonstrates a commitment to sustainability and efficiency in boating. The initiative is expected to have a profound impact on the boating sector in the U.S. and Canada, with stakeholders eagerly anticipating the widespread adoption of Finsulate® and Hy.G Motors. Stay tuned for the buzz surrounding these game-changing products as they redefine the future of boating in the region.

data.title: Greenlight Guru acquires Enzyme, second acquisition in recent weeks, boosting innovation for medtech, life sciences.
data.description: In a recent development, Greenlight Guru, a prominent provider of advanced software solutions for the complete medical device lifecycle, revealed their acquisition. This marks as their second acquisition in a short span of time, reflecting their commitment towards advancing innovation for medtech and life sciences companies. The acquisition comes on July 24, 2025, in Indianapolis. This move showcases the company's strategic approach in driving growth and enhancing services.

data.title: Middlefield Real Estate Dividend ETF (TSX: MREL) to pay distributions to unitholders for Q3 2025.
data.description: The Middlefield Real Estate Dividend ETF (TSX: MREL) based in Toronto has declared distributions for the third quarter of 2025 for its unitholders. The payments will be made as per the Fund's distribution announcement. This initiative aims to benefit the unit holders of Middlefield Real Estate Dividend ETF during the specified period.
